justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified the user's preferred date and time, and then correctly adjusted to the next day when the first preference was unavailable.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered alternative dates when the initial request was unavailable and then found a suitable time on the next preferred day.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in a minimal number of turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the user's needs and finding a suitable appointment.
